comment:
Build command envelopes for the JavaScript companion bridge.

Most higher-level companion modules use this module internally, but it is handy
when you need to talk to a custom bridge API.

    import Json.Encode as Encode
    import Pebble.Companion.Command as Command

    vibrateCommand =
        Command.command "cmd-1" "watch" "vibrate"
            |> Command.withPayload (Encode.object [])

# Command envelopes
@docs command, withPayload
name: Pebble.Companion.Command

values.comment: Build a command envelope with an empty payload.
values.name: command

values.comment: Replace payload on an existing command envelope.
values.name: withPayload

aliases.comment: Structured command envelope sent from Elm to the JS companion bridge.
aliases.name: CommandEnvelope
aliases.type:
{ id : String
, api : String
, op : String
, payload : Encode.Value
}

aliases.comment: Structured result envelope sent from JS companion bridge back to Elm.
aliases.name: ResultEnvelope
aliases.type:
{ id : String
, ok : Bool
, payload : Maybe Decode.Value
, error : Maybe BridgeError
}

aliases.comment: Structured bridge errors instead of plain string errors.
aliases.name: BridgeError
aliases.type:
{ type_ : String
, message : String
, retryable : Maybe Bool
}

aliases.comment: Pushed event envelope from JS companion bridge to Elm.
aliases.name: BridgeEvent

comment:
Shared data contracts for the Pebble companion bridge.

These records describe the JSON envelopes exchanged between Elm and the
JavaScript bridge.

# Envelopes
@docs CommandEnvelope, ResultEnvelope, BridgeError, BridgeEvent
name: Pebble.Companion.Contract
Pebble.Companion.Codec

values.comment: Encode a command envelope into wire JSON.
values.name: encodeCommand

name: Pebble.Companion.Configuration

unions.comment: Configuration lifecycle events reported by the bridge.
unions.name: Event

values.comment: Decode a bridge event into a configuration event.
values.name: decode

values.comment: Ask the companion bridge to open a configuration URL.
values.name: open

name: Pebble.Companion.Geolocation

unions.comment: Geolocation events reported by the bridge.
unions.name: Event

values.comment: Request the current phone location once.
values.name: getCurrentPosition

values.comment: Stop a previously started location watch.
values.name: clearWatch

comment:
Observe phone companion lifecycle events.

Subscribe once during companion startup and route pushed bridge events through
`decode`.

# Events
@docs Event, decode

# Commands
@docs subscribe

unions.comment: Lifecycle events emitted by the companion bridge.

unions.comment: Network status events from the companion bridge.

name: Pebble.Companion.Storage

unions.comment: Values that can be stored by the companion bridge.

comment:
Timeline commands for companion-driven pins.

    Pebble.Companion.Timeline.insertPin "pin-create" pinJson

# Commands
@docs getToken, insertPin, deletePin
name: Pebble.Companion.Timeline

values.comment: Request the timeline token for the current user.
values.name: getToken

values.comment: Insert or update a timeline pin from encoded pin JSON.
values.name: insertPin

values.comment: Delete a timeline pin by id.
values.name: deletePin

name: Pebble.Companion.WebSocket

unions.comment: WebSocket events emitted by the companion bridge.
unions.name: Event

values.comment: Send a string message over the active WebSocket.
values.name: send
